data.title: Saudi Arabia online grocery delivery market to reach $4.98B by 2030, growing at 20.21% CAGR, driven by key players.
data.description: A report on the Saudi Arabia Online Grocery Delivery Market has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The market was valued at USD 1.65 billion in 2024 and is projected to reach USD 4.98 billion by 2030, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 20.21%. The growth in the market is mainly fueled by the growing digital adoption, especially through mobile applications that streamline the grocery shopping process.

data.title: Former Texas A&M football player Chris Larkin returns to rally against ALS, attempts world record ALS Ice Bucket Challenge.
data.description: Aggieland Against ALS was established by Chris Larkin, a former Texas A&M football player, and his wife Cissy. The organization aims to rally the Texas A&M community in the battle against ALS, in collaboration with the ALS Association. This initiative was launched in College Station, Texas on October 24, 2025. Chris Larkin, who used to play as a tight end for Texas A&M, became inspired to start this movement...

data.title: Arkema gains ISCC PLUS certification for waterborne resins in Italy, reducing PCF up to 100% at the Boretto site.
data.description: In Paris on October 24, 2025, Arkema, an expert in specialty materials, disclosed that they have obtained ISCC PLUS certification for their waterborne acrylic resins produced in Boretto, Italy. This achievement aligns with Arkema's worldwide Mass Balance roadmap. The reduction in Product Carbon Footprint (PCF) at the site reaches a maximum of 100%.

data.title: Inventor creates GPS Life Jacket to improve locating in water emergencies. Made in New Iberia, LA.
data.description: A resident of New Iberia, Louisiana, expressed his motivation to develop a high-quality life jacket aimed at increasing the likelihood of rescue during water emergencies. The innovative product, known as the GPS Life Jacket, was designed to not only keep individuals afloat but also enhance their visibility for potential rescuers. The inventor's goal was to create a reliable safety option that integrates GPS technology, ensuring precise tracking in case of emergencies. This new invention is expected to significantly improve safety measures for water activities.

data.title: Interactive natural hazard risk dashboard for mortgages launched at UMD Smith, assessing risks for residential mortgage borrowers across the US.
data.description: In a recent development on October 24, 2025, in College Park, Maryland, an innovative digital tool has been launched to evaluate the risks associated with natural hazards for residential mortgage applicants nationwide. This tool, created by the Robert H. Smith School of Business at the University of Maryland, is currently operational. It aims to provide a comprehensive assessment of the potential risks linked to natural disasters for individuals seeking residential mortgages in the United States. This tool is accessible online and offers a detailed analysis catering to mortgage borrowers, aiding them in understanding and preparing for potential hazards in their respective regions.

data.title: Saudi Arabia Automotive Repair and Maintenance Services Industry Report 2025: Digitalization and EV-Specific Services are Shaping the $3.47 Billion Landscape - Forecast to 2030 - ResearchAndMarkets.com
data.description: Dublin - A report on the Saudi Arabia Automotive Repair and Maintenance Services Market has recently been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. In 2024, the market was valued at USD 1.62 billion, with expectations to reach USD 2.47 billion by 2030, showing a projected growth rate of 7.28% during this period. The automotive repair and maintenance services sector in Saudi Arabia is a significant part of the market landscape.
